zh.lifeSummary: 當Avelina de Neville於1307年出生在英國達勒姆拉比時，她的父親Ralph Neville45歲，母親Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering41歲。她於1327年與Norville Norton在英國英格蘭貝德福爾貝德福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1353年在英國貝德福爾斯特亞特利享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avelina de Neville于1307年出生在英国達勒姆拉比时，她的父亲Ralph Neville45岁，母亲Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering41岁。她于1327年与Norville Norton在英国英格兰貝德福爾貝德福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1353年在英国貝德福爾斯特亞特利享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .
Catalan: variant of   Novell  .

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .
English: variant of   Noel  .
English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Avelina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Norman name   Evelyn .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Avelina de Neville was born in 1307, in Raby, Durham, England, her father, Ralph Neville, was 45 and her mother, Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering, was 41. She married Norville Norton in 1327, in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1353, in Streatley, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 46.

Elle a épousé Norville Norton en 1327, à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1353, à Streatley, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ko.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: 영국 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호
ko.lifeSummary: Avelina de Neville(이)가 1307년 영국 뒤람 라비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1327년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에서 Norville Norton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1353년 영국 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: шарпено, стритли вит шарпено, бедфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avelina de Neville родилась в 1307 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Norville Norton в 1327 г. в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1353 г. в местности стритли, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

Se casó con Norville Norton en 1327, en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
